mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ops_incident_state ( state_id, diagnosis_id, session_id, event_id, service_name, severity, alert_rule, time_window_json, current_round, max_rounds, plan_json, metrics_evidence_json, log_evidence_json, trace_evidence_json, runbook_evidence_json, candidate_root_causes_json, missing_evidence_json, tool_history_json, review_status, final_report, status, error_message, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{stateId}, #{diagnosisId}, #{sessionId}, #{eventId}, #{serviceName}, #{severity}, #{alertRule}, #{timeWindowJson}, #{currentRound}, #{maxRounds}, #{planJson}, #{metricsEvidenceJson}, #{logEvidenceJson}, #{traceEvidenceJson}, #{runbookEvidenceJson}, #{candidateRootCausesJson}, #{missingEvidenceJson}, #{toolHistoryJson}, #{reviewStatus}, #{finalReport}, #{status}, #{errorMessage}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, state_id, diagnosis_id, session_id, event_id, service_name, severity, alert_rule, time_window_json, current_round, max_rounds, plan_json, metrics_evidence_json, log_evidence_json, trace_evidence_json, runbook_evidence_json, candidate_root_causes_json, missing_evidence_json, tool_history_json, review_status, final_report, status, error_message, create_time, update_time FROM ops_incident_state WHERE diagnosis_id = #{diagnosisId} LIMIT 1
